name: PickerInputObjectAndAPoint
summary: The PickerInputObjectAndAPoint class represents a pick of an object in a view. It provides both the picked object and the point used to pick the object. Used for values asked by UI.Picker.PickObject(string Prompt, out DrawingObject PickedObject, out ViewBase PickedView, out Point PickedPoint).

constructors.name: PickerInputObjectAndAPoint
constructors.summary: Creates a new PickerInputObjectAndAPoint instance representing the pick of a drawing object and the coordinates of the point used to pick the object.

params.name: pickedPoint
params.doc: The picked point in the picked object view coordinates.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

properties.name: PickedObject
properties.summary: Gets or sets the picked object in the view.

properties.name: PickedPoint
properties.summary: Gets or sets the picked point in the view coordinates.

properties.name: PickedView
properties.summary: The view within which the pick occurred.
